title: Undauntable

The '''''Undauntable''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]. Commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Jaim Helaw]], it was the oldest ship on the line in its quadrant, but was maintained in excellent condition under Helaw's command. Prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], it was assigned to the fleet under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Conan Antonio Motti/Legends|Motti]] and tasked with guarding the construction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] at [[Despayre]].

Before the battle-station's completion, the ''Undauntable'' was destroyed by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent who had managed to detonate a cargo container rigged full of explosives stored in the ship's aft cargo hold. The ''Undauntable'' was lost with all hands.

The incident was later covered up at the direction of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]] and with the complicity of Motti and Admiral [[Natasi Daala|Daala]]. The destruction of the ''Undauntable'' was officially held to be an accident and the blame was posthumously laid at the feet of Admiral Helaw, tarnishing an otherwise exemplary career. Admiral [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] later tried, and failed, to investigate the case.

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}}
